experiments.name: lam_0.5
experiments.description: Half-strength spectral shape. Less anisotropy = less sharp basin = more stable?

experiments.name: lam_2.0
experiments.description: Double-strength spectral shape. More anisotropy = sharper basin but faster convergence?

experiments.name: clip_0.5
experiments.description: Tighter gradient clipping (0.5 vs 1.0). Gentler updates = less spike damage?

experiments.name: clip_0.25
experiments.description: Very tight gradient clipping (0.25). Prevents nearly all spike damage.

experiments.name: no_embed_spectral
experiments.description: Spectral init for attn/FFN only, orthogonal for embeddings. Embedding reconstruction is worst (r=0.82).

experiments.name: spike_skip_50x_clip_0.5
experiments.description: Both spike skip AND tighter clip. Belt + suspenders for stability.
